name: @nimblebraininc/mcp-quiver
description: Political and alternative financial data from Quiver Quantitative

api_key.title: Quiver API Key
api_key.description: Your Quiver Quantitative API key from https://www.quiverquant.com

tools.name: get_congress_trades
tools.description: Get congressional stock trades for a ticker symbol

tools.name: get_congress_trades_bulk
tools.description: Get all recent congressional trades across all tickers

tools.name: get_politician_profile
tools.description: Get detailed politician profile including trading history, committees, and donors

tools.name: get_lobbying
tools.description: Get lobbying spend records for a ticker symbol

tools.name: get_lobbying_bulk
tools.description: Get all lobbying data across all tickers

tools.name: get_gov_contracts
tools.description: Get government contract awards for a ticker symbol

tools.name: get_gov_contracts_bulk
tools.description: Get all government contract data across all tickers
